name: vibe-sec
description: Vibe Sec — canary channel. Tracks the main branch of the solo repo. For stable releases pinned to tagged versions, install via the aggregated 626Labs marketplace at github.com/estevanhernandez-stack-ed/vibe-plugins.

plugins.name: vibe-sec
plugins.description: Security gap finder for vibe-coded apps — leaked secrets, sketchy auth, missing input validation, stale dependencies. Full plugin coming soon; secret-leak scanner CLI available now via @esthernandez/vibe-sec-cli.
